text: Your starting army is generated by selecting a random lord from your race and building a matching force around them. A Legendary Lord may appear. You may reroll, return later, or confirm this army to begin the run.
Dismiss this host and muster a new starting force. Both the lord and the units will be redrawn.
Close this event for now. The current army will remain on the map for inspection, and you may reopen this event at any time from the Warhammer Spire button.
Accept this army and begin the climb.

Welcome to Warhammer Spire. Heed these words before you begin:\\n\\n1. This mod follows a roguelike structure, with progress driven entirely through events. Do not manually add units or heroes to armies generated by this mod.\\n\\n2. After each battle, all units are fully restored. No battle losses carry over.\\n\\n3. The journey ends only after three consecutive defeats. For pacing, concluding around turn 35 is recommended; enemy rank gives a rough measure of your current stage.\\n\\n4. Battlefield generation depends on your army's position on the campaign map, so you may reposition your force to shape the coming battlefield. Do not move the army into a settlement, however, as that may trigger a siege battle and upset the intended balance.\\n\\n5. MCT support is included for adjusting difficulty multipliers. \\n\\n6. This mod is only guaranteed to support standard subfactions. Some factions with unusual starting positions, such as Aislinn, may not function reliably.

Choose a unit reward for this stage.\\n\\nThe value of available units rises as the climb continues.\\n\\nIf your army has limited space, rewards that grant multiple units may only be received in part.
This reward is drawn from your faction's unit pool.
This reward is drawn from your faction's unit pool.
This reward is drawn from the unit pool of the current node faction.
Set this matter aside for now. You may reopen the same reward later from the Warhammer Spire button.
Forgo this stage's unit reward and proceed directly to the next event.

Prepare for the battle ahead. Retreat is forbidden, so this is your last chance to inspect your host before the fighting begins.Ensure that your lord and heroes bear the equipment and skills they require.\\n\\nFallen units will be restored to full strength after battle.\\n\\nYou may also reposition your army on the campaign map beforehand to influence the battlefield.
I am prepared. Let the foe come.
Take time to marshal your force. You may reopen this battle event later from the Warhammer Spire button.
An elite battle stands before you. The foe is exceptionally powerful, and autoresolve is disabled by default.\\n\\nPrevail, and you will earn the chance to claim an artefact.
I am prepared. Let the foe come.
Take time to marshal your force. You may reopen this elite battle event later from the Warhammer Spire button.
Defeat is no stranger to war.\\n\\nAfter each loss, your army and heroes will be restored, but their skills and equipment must be assigned anew. Some items may also have been lost.

Your army has suffered three defeats in succession. This journey is at an end. Perhaps your host was ill-suited to the trials ahead, or the foe proved the stronger. Regather your thoughts, reconsider your strategy, and return to the main menu when you are ready to begin anew.
You are victorious. Choose 1 item from 4 offerings and add it to your faction's inventory.
Choose the next destination on your journey.\\n\\nAt that node, you will face enemies of the chosen faction and gain access to that faction's unit and equipment rewards.
Adjust Warhammer Spire balance settings, elite battle autoresolve, and logging.
Multiplier applied to player reward value bands. Default: 1.00. Range: 0.00 to 3.00.
Multiplier applied to enemy value budgets. Default: 1.00. Range: 0.00 to 3.00.
If enabled, elite Warhammer Spire battles may use autoresolve. If disabled, autoresolve remains locked for elite battles.
If enabled, Warhammer Spire writes debug logs to adamrogue_phase_a_log.txt in the game directory.
This road may yet prove worthy.
There is still profit in remaining here.
Hold your course for now. You may reopen this event later from the Warhammer Spire button.
[[col:yellow]]Keep the current candidates and choose again the next time you press the button.[[/col]]
Begin a Warhammer Spire run, or resume an unfinished chain of events from where you last left it.
This stage offers you a choice of 1 from 3 heroes drawn from your own faction. Selecting a hero will replace this stage's normal unit reward.
Recruit the first hero shown below. If your army has room, this hero will join your current Rogue force and be raised to the current stage's level.
Recruit the second hero shown below. If your army has room, this hero will join your current Rogue force and be raised to the current stage's level.
Recruit the third hero shown below. If your army has room, this hero will join your current Rogue force and be raised to the current stage's level.
Set this matter aside for now. You may reopen the same hero selection later from the Warhammer Spire button.
Forgo this stage's hero reward and proceed to the normal unit reward event instead. The usual battle flow will still follow.
Your current Rogue force already stands at 20 units, and no further hero may join it. Make room within the army, or return to the reward page and choose another option.
Return to the previous page of hero reward candidates.
